args.claim: Tavily’s pricing is based on monthly API credits, with a free Researcher plan (1,000 credits/month), several fixed paid tiers, pay‑as‑you‑go at $0.008 per credit, and custom enterprise plans.
args.quote: Tavily offers a range of pricing plans based on monthly API credits and usage needs, from a free tier to enterprise. The Free “Researcher” plan includes 1,000 credits/month... A Pay-As-You-Go option charges $0.008 per credit with no base fee, and an Enterprise plan provides custom pricing.
